local_changes: Reject document review now requires a non-empty reason in the UI and backend.
KYC document upload, reject/review, and re-verify refresh back to the Documents & Evidence tab.
View uses the inline preview endpoint/new tab path while Download remains the attachment path.
S3 presigned URLs now preserve authorization and support inline Content-Disposition for previewable documents.
Document row More dropdown closes on outside click, Escape, and after action selection.
